summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CreaoBrowser authentication and admin system. All core features working correctly including owner login with security question, admin panel functionality, user registration with email verification, and ban/unban capabilities.

minor_issues.issue: Session cookies not properly maintained between requests in test script
minor_issues.impact: Minor - affects testing only, not actual functionality

passed_tests: Login page loads when not authenticated
Owner login with username 'Ghost' password 'Gage2011!' shows security question screen
Security question answer field is masked (type=password) for privacy
Answering 'moms steak' lets owner into browser
Owner badge shows 'Owner' next to username in title bar
Admin Panel button visible only for owner
Admin Panel opens and shows user list with online/offline status
Admin Panel has Ban and Delete buttons for non-owner users
Cannot ban or delete the owner account (buttons not shown)
Registration form requires email field
Registration shows email verification code step
Regular user can register and login
Owner can ban a user with custom duration and reason
Owner can unban a user
Banned user status reflected in admin panel
Regular users do not have admin panel access
Auth protection - admin endpoints require owner role
Email verification code generation and validation
User online/offline status tracking
Logout functionality working correctly
